reason: Root node 1 is a pure composition of its three conjuncts over children 1.1-1.4, but one of those children is NOT validated and carries an OPEN challenge, so the root cannot yet be accepted. Specifically: conjunct (1) q_r >= -C eta ||r||^2 1 is established by child 1.2 (LOWER BOUND); conjuncts (2) ||P(q_r^2)|| <= C eta ||r||^4 and (3) ||q_r||_omega <= C sqrt(eta) ||r||^2 are established by 1.3 and 1.4, BOTH of which transitively use node 1.2's bound (1.3 Step B sets gamma=C delta||r||^2 from 1.2 and forms y:=q_r+gamma1 >= 0; 1.4 -> 1.3). Node 1.2 is currently epistemic=pending, workflow=claimed, and carries OPEN major challenge ch-7e69ad1273a8057b (target=gap), unresolved. I independently re-adjudicated that challenge and confirm it is substantively correct, NOT a tooling artifact: 1.2 Step C uses GT-phi-contraction (||Phi(r)||<=||r||) as a load-bearing leaf, but GT-phi-contraction's own Source field flags it as a DERIVATION (||Phi||=1 re-derived from GT-orderunit-def + GT-positive-monotone + Phi-unitality, mirroring the SIBLING validated lem-P-properties node 1.1.1 which PROVES it), and  over refs/ for 'order-unit-norm contraction'/'order unit contraction' returns ZERO hits -- so it is NOT a verbatim refs/ ground-truth match. Per L1 (ground truth = byte-verbatim refs/ match) and the doctrine 'a derivation = af node', this load-bearing multi-premise derivation must be an explicit grounded child node (from in-scope leaves GT-positive-monotone + GT-orderunit-def + Phi-unitality) or imported as part of a validated lemma's exported contract; ||Phi||=1 is NOT in the GT-Pprops/lem-P-properties root contract. The fix is constructive (add the in-scope derivation child, or use the in-scope triangle bound ||Phi(r)|| = ||(Phi(r)-r)+r|| <= delta||r||+||r|| = (1+delta)||r||, giving ||x+r||<=(2+delta)||r||, constant still universal & dimension-free), but until 1.2 is repaired and validated the root is unsound. SCOPE NOTE: I independently re-verified the OTHER children and externals and find them sound -- GT-jordan-schwarz VERBATIM at refs/vlw-2604.08380/paper.tex (the self-adjoint reading Phi(r)^2<=Phi(r^2) is correct: {Tr,Tr}<=T{r,r} with r=r^*); node 1.3.1 JB functional calculus (0<=y<=M1 => 0<=y^2<=My) is sound; node 1.4 seminorm reading rho(Phi(q_r^2)) with state |rho(a)|<=||a|| (GT-state-bounded) is correct; constants are universal/dimension-free and the exponents are eta (1.2,1.3) and sqrt(eta) (1.4) exactly. The SOLE blocker for the root is the unvalidated, actively-challenged child 1.2. Recommendation: resolve ch-7e69ad1273a8057b (add the grounding child / triangle bound), get 1.2 validated, THEN re-submit node 1.
